WorkflowDefinition.Name: WF_5165_GestionPrixAchat_POA
WorkflowDefinition.Description: Mis à jour du prix d'achat POA sure la modification de l'indice Creation Date: 08/05/2026 Updated Date: Version: 1.0

FlowPart.Name: GetPlannedPO
FlowPart.Description: Récupération de l'ordre d'achat planifiée PPS170
FlowPart.IonApiMethod: {"productLogicalId":"infor.m3","operationProxyPath":"M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute/PPS170MI","operationRestPath":"/GetPlannedPO","productName":"M3","operationPath":"M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute/PPS170MI/GetPlannedPO","summary":"Get a planned purchase order","httpMethod":"GET","availableOutputContentTypes":["JSON"],"outputContentType":"JSON","input":[{"wfVariableName":"PK01","literalValue":null,"name":"PLPN","description":"Order proposal number(7)","swaggerDatatype":"number","swaggerFormat":null,"required":true,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"CONO","description":"Company(3)","swaggerDatatype":"number","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":"PK02","literalValue":null,"name":"PLPS","description":"Sub number - order proposal(3)","swaggerDatatype":"number","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":"PK03","literalValue":null,"name":"PLP2","description":"Subnumber - order proposal(5)","swaggerDatatype":"number","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"cono","description":"The company context to use. Defaults to user default","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"divi","description":"The division context to use. Defaults to user default","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"lanc","description":"The language code to use. Defaults to user default","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"locale","description":"The locale to use","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"timeZone","description":"The time zone to use","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"maxrecs","description":"Max number of records returned. 0 is unlimited","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"dateformat","description":"Date format to use","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"excludeempty","description":"When true, empty fields are omitted in response","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"righttrim","description":"When true, all values are right trimmed in response","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"returncols","description":"A comma separated list of column names that should be included in the response. Defaults to all columns","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"format","description":"Controls output JSON format","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"extendedresult","description":"Show transaction parameters in the response","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"positionkey","description":"The position in a table to start reading from","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"HEADER"}],"output":[{"wfVariableName":"ITNO","type":"BODY","path":"$.results[0].records[0].ITNO","optional":true},{"wfVariableName":"OURR","type":"BODY","path":"$.results[0].records[0].OURR","optional":true},{"wfVariableName":"SUNO","type":"BODY","path":"$.results[0].records[0].SUNO","optional":true}],"inputBody":{"name":null,"description":null,"required":false,"availableInputContentTypes":[],"inputContentType":null,"body":" ","ignore":true,"structureNamesFromBody":[],"variableNamesFromBody":[]}}

FlowPart.Name: APIFlow
FlowPart.IonApiMethod: {"productLogicalId":"inforos.apiflows","operationProxyPath":"APIFLOWS/5165","operationRestPath":"/GPA","productName":"Infor API Flows","operationPath":"APIFLOWS/5165/GPA","summary":"","httpMethod":"POST","availableOutputContentTypes":["JSON"],"outputContentType":"JSON","input":[{"wfVariableName":"CBMSGT1","literalValue":null,"name":"reve","description":"Indice OA/POA","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"HEADER"},{"wfVariableName":"TodaysDate","literalValue":null,"name":"date","description":"Date OA/POA pour comparison","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"HEADER"},{"wfVariableName":"OURR","literalValue":null,"name":"ourr","description":"Agreeement Number","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"HEADER"},{"wfVariableName":"ITNO","literalValue":null,"name":"itno","description":"Numéro d'artice","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"HEADER"},{"wfVariableName":"SUNO","literalValue":null,"name":"suno","description":"Numéro fournisseur","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"HEADER"},{"wfVariableName":"PK01","literalValue":null,"name":"puno","description":"","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"HEADER"},{"wfVariableName":"PK02","literalValue":null,"name":"pnli","description":null,"swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"HEADER"},{"wfVariableName":"PK03","literalValue":null,"name":"pnls","description":null,"swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"HEADER"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":"2","name":"flag","description":"1 = OA , 2 = POA","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"HEADER"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"ionapiRespStyle","description":"Indicate to execute synchronously or asynchronously","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"}],"output":[{"wfVariableName":"APIFlowOut","type":"BODY","path":"$","optional":false}],"inputBody":{"name":null,"description":null,"required":false,"availableInputContentTypes":[],"inputContentType":null,"body":"
